nasb.text: Now one of the Pharisees was requesting Him to dine with him, and He entered the Pharisee’s house and reclined at the table.

esv.text: One of the Pharisees asked him to eat with him, and he went into the Pharisee’s house and reclined at table.

cnv.text: 有一個法利賽人，請耶穌同他吃飯，他就到法利賽人家去赴席。

ccb.text: 有一个法利赛人请耶稣到他家里吃饭，耶稣应邀赴宴。

csbs.text: 有一个法利赛人请耶稣与他一起吃饭，耶稣就进到那法利赛人的家里坐席。
